properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will worship, I will worship You I will worship, I will worship You I will worship, I will worship You I will worship, I will worship You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Into Your hand I commit again With All I am For You Lord You hold my world in the palm of Your hand And I'm Yours forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus I believe in You Jesus I belong to You You're the reason that I live The reason that I sing with all I am

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll walk with You wherever You go Through tears and joy I'll trust in You And I will live in all of Your ways Your promises forever
